items: Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening
Approval of Agreement for a Modernization Project with ICC at Adelante Selby School
Approval of Additional Legacy Closeout Support Proposal with WLC Architects at Clifford School
Approval of Tracking List for Measure T Bond Program Items Under $20K
Approval of Utility Fees with the City of Redwood City for Hoover School
Approval of Motorized Gate Proposal with A&D Auto Gate for North Star Academy
Approval of Portable Rental Agreement with Mobile Modular for Roosevelt School
Approval of Library Moving Services with Chipman for Taft School
Approval of Multi-Prime Construction Agreements with Various Contractors at Taft School
Adoption of Resolution 21, Resolution of Emergency Relating to Coronavirus (COVID-19)
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Staff recognition item was pulled from the posted agenda and moved to after item 5 (Oral Communication). The board president announced: 'This is Dennis. I'd like to add staff recognition. I need to pull up my after oral communication. Wherever you'd like it. We'll move it after item five.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: And a roll call vote, please. Trustee McBride. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Trustee Dias Locum. Aye. Trustee McAvoy. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye.

items.intro_words: Here. Trustee Marquez. Here. Trustee Diaz locum. Here.
Here. Trustee McAvoy. Present. Tracy Lawson. Here.
Welcome, everybody. It's good to see some familiar faces again.
We've been emailing and texting, but it's nice to actually see people.
My name is Jude. I am in the second grade at Henry Ford School.
Moving on. Are there any changes to the agenda? This is Dennis.
Do we have a motion to approve the agenda? So moved.
So we are on to item six, the bond program consent items to approve.
Stanley, thank you. And I'm sure I speak for everybody.
Okay, so we will move on to the staff recognition.
So we are on to item six, the bond program consent items to approve.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia.
All right, moving on to 7.1, which is a bond action item.
Does anyone have any questions about the TAF construction agreement?
Okay, item 8.1, which I think is here for. So, John, did you want to go ahead and start?
So good evening. So before I start and before I have cabinet members give a bit of an overview, I want to also applaud some people.
No items on consent. Moving on to item 10.1. Action item.
Moving on to item 10.1. Action item. This is the resolution of emergency relating to COVID 19.
Let's see. We are on 11.1. Report from board members and superintendent.
I had two things before. This is what I want to show you.
So my hefty recommendation was to all cabinet members and principals and all staff, unplug next week.
Other business suggested items for future agenda. Anybody have anything else?
And then changes to the agenda, the board agenda, schedule. No.
Is there a motion to adjourn. In unison?
